EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITransformation3DGEN

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control a 3D affine transformation. ITransformation3DGEN is generic version of ITransformation3D.

[Guid("1B9FA97E-66C8-477C-88C2-E87A96B56239")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITransformation3DGEN

Methods

PostMultiply(ITransformation3D) 

void PostMultiply(ITransformation3D postTransform)

Parameters

postTransform ITransformation3D

PreMultiply(ITransformation3D) 

void PreMultiply(ITransformation3D preTransform)

Parameters

preTransform ITransformation3D

Reset()

Resets the transformation to unit matrix.

void Reset()

Examples

Sample Snippet

Rotate(double, IVector3D) 

void Rotate(double rotationAngle, IVector3D rotationAxis)

Parameters

rotationAngle double
rotationAxis IVector3D

Scale(double, double, double)

Adds a scaling factor to the transformation matrix.

void Scale(double sx, double sy, double sz)

Parameters

sx double
sy double
sz double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Transform(ref WKSPointZ[], ref WKSPointZ[]) 

void Transform(ref WKSPointZ[] originalPoints, ref WKSPointZ[] transformedPoints)

Parameters

originalPoints WKSPointZ[]
transformedPoints WKSPointZ[]
